proof: function[T0, T1](x1: T1, x2: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x1, x2) = x1 }[Real, Real](c, x)
function[T0, T1](x1: T1, x2: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x1, x2) = x1 }[Real, Real](c, x0)

goal: constant(c, x) - constant(c, x0) = c - c

proof: function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { x1 + x2 - x2 = x1 }(Real.0, c)
function(x1: Real) { Real.0 + x1 = x1 }(c)
function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { x1 * x2.inverse = x1 / x2 }(Real.0, x - x0)
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1(x2) - x1(x3)) / (x2 - x3) = difference_quotient(x1, x3, x2) }(constant(c), x, x0)
function[T0](x1: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x1) = x1 }[Real](x)
function[T0](x1: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x1) = x1 }[Real](x0)
function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { x1 * x2 = x2 * x1 }(x - x0, Real.1)
function(x1: Real) { Real.1 * x1 = x1 }(x - x0)
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1(x2) - x1(x3)) / (x2 - x3) = difference_quotient(x1, x3, x2) }(identity_fn[Real], x, x0)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { x1 != x0 and x1.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x1).is_close(Real.0, eps) } }
proof: function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, x1) or difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x2).is_close(Real.0, eps) }) }(eps)
function(x1: Real) { not forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, x1) or difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x2).is_close(Real.0, eps) } or not x1.is_positive }(eps)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0 != x0 and w0.is_close(x0, eps) and not difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, w0).is_close(Real.0, eps) }
function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_close(x0, eps) or difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x1).is_close(Real.0, eps) or x0 = x1 }(w0)

goal: has_derivative_at(constant(c), x0, Real.0) = forall(x1: Real) { x1.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 != x0 and x2.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x2).is_close(Real.0, x1) } } }
proof: function(x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x5: Real) { x1 = x5 or not x5.is_close(x1, k0) or difference_quotient(x2, x1, x5).is_close(x3, x4) } } } = has_derivative_at(x2, x1, x3) }(x0, constant(c), Real.0)

goal: not forall(x1: Real) { x1.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 != x0 and x2.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x2).is_close(Real.0, x1) } } }
proof: let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0 != x0 and k0.is_close(x0, x1) and not difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, k0).is_close(Real.0, w0) } } }

function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, k0) or difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x2).is_close(Real.0, x1) } } }(w0)
w0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k1: Real) { k1 != x0 and k1.is_close(x0, x2) and not difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, k1).is_close(Real.0, w0) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { w1.is_positive and forall(x3: Real) { x3 = x0 or not x3.is_close(x0, w1) or difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x3).is_close(Real.0, w0) } }
function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, x1) or difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x2).is_close(Real.0, w0) }) }(w1)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 != x0 and x2.is_close(x0, x1) implies difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x2).is_close(Real.0, k0) }) } }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { x1 != x0 and x1.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x1).is_close(Real.0, bad_eps) } }
proof: function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, k0) or difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x2).is_close(Real.0, x1) } } }(bad_eps)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { x1 = x0 or not x1.is_close(x0, w0) or difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x1).is_close(Real.0, bad_eps) } }
(forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0 != x0 and k0.is_close(x0, x2) and not difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, k0).is_close(Real.0, bad_eps) } } = true)
function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, x1) or difference_quotient(constant(c), x0, x2).is_close(Real.0, bad_eps) }) }(w0)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { x1 != x0 and x1.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x1).is_close(Real.1, eps) } }
proof: function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, x1) or difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x2).is_close(Real.1, eps) }) }(eps)
function(x1: Real) { not forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, x1) or difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x2).is_close(Real.1, eps) } or not x1.is_positive }(eps)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0 != x0 and w0.is_close(x0, eps) and not difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, w0).is_close(Real.1, eps) }
function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_close(x0, eps) or difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x1).is_close(Real.1, eps) or x0 = x1 }(w0)

goal: has_derivative_at(identity_fn[Real], x0, Real.1) = forall(x1: Real) { x1.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 != x0 and x2.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x2).is_close(Real.1, x1) } } }
proof: function(x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x5: Real) { x1 = x5 or not x5.is_close(x1, k0) or difference_quotient(x2, x1, x5).is_close(x3, x4) } } } = has_derivative_at(x2, x1, x3) }(x0, identity_fn[Real], Real.1)

goal: not forall(x1: Real) { x1.is_positive implies exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 != x0 and x2.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x2).is_close(Real.1, x1) } } }
proof: let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0 != x0 and k0.is_close(x0, x1) and not difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, k0).is_close(Real.1, w0) } } }

function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, k0) or difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x2).is_close(Real.1, x1) } } }(w0)
w0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k1: Real) { k1 != x0 and k1.is_close(x0, x2) and not difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, k1).is_close(Real.1, w0) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { w1.is_positive and forall(x3: Real) { x3 = x0 or not x3.is_close(x0, w1) or difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x3).is_close(Real.1, w0) } }
function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, x1) or difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x2).is_close(Real.1, w0) }) }(w1)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 != x0 and x2.is_close(x0, x1) implies difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x2).is_close(Real.1, k0) }) } }
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { x1 != x0 and x1.is_close(x0, k0) implies difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x1).is_close(Real.1, bad_eps) } }
proof: function(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, k0) or difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x2).is_close(Real.1, x1) } } }(bad_eps)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x1: Real) { x1 = x0 or not x1.is_close(x0, w0) or difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x1).is_close(Real.1, bad_eps) } }
(forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0 != x0 and k0.is_close(x0, x2) and not difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, k0).is_close(Real.1, bad_eps) } } = true)
function(x1: Real) { not (x1.is_positive and forall(x2: Real) { x2 = x0 or not x2.is_close(x0, x1) or difference_quotient(identity_fn[Real], x0, x2).is_close(Real.1, bad_eps) }) }(w0)
function(x1: Real) { not has_derivative_at(constant(c), x0, x1) }(Real.0)
let w0: Real satisfy { has_derivative_at(constant(c), x0, w0) }
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(constant(c), x0)
function(x1: Real) { not has_derivative_at(identity_fn[Real], x0, x1) }(Real.1)
let w0: Real satisfy { has_derivative_at(identity_fn[Real], x0, w0) }
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(identity_fn[Real], x0)
